name: Almond Apple Wheat Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Apple cider or juice (up to 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute apples, almonds, onion, and celery in butter for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Remove from heat and stir in cinnamon, poultry seasoning, and salt.
3. Toss together bread cubes and raisins; add the apple mixture.
4. Stir egg into 1/3 cup (or 1/2 cup) of apple cider; toss into the bread mixture.
5. Add remaining apple cider if a moister stuffing is desired.
6. Use to stuff a 15 to 20 lb turkey, or two large roasting chickens.
7. Spoon any remaining stuffing into a lightly greased 9x5 loaf pan.
8. Bake, covered, during the last 30-40 minutes of roasting.
